headline: MSCI Advances Transparency in Private Markets With Acquisition of PM Insights
summary: NEW YORK, April 07, 2026--MSCI Inc. (NYSE: MSCI) has acquired PM Insights1, a specialist private markets data and analytics firm that provides daily secondary market reference data, including on pricing, valuation, transaction and liquidity, for private company securities.
